mnemonics: Singly Linked List: Node has only one pointer (next)
Chain of Nodes: Linked together like a chain
Representing Chain in C: Use pointers to link nodes
Linked Stacks: LIFO (Last In First Out)
Linked Queues: FIFO (First In First Out)
keyPoints: Definition of a Singly Linked List
Types of Linked Lists: Singly Linked, Doubly Linked
Operations on Linked Lists: Insertion, Deletion, Traversal
Linked Stacks and Queues: Implementing using Linked Lists
Advantages and Disadvantages of Linked Lists
